# websim-stub

Local development stub for WebSim platform APIs. Enables neon apps to run without the WebSim environment.

## Test Page

Open `index.html` to interactively test all APIs:
- Configure OpenAI
- Test chat completions
- Manage collections
- Test user/image APIs

## Usage

```html
<script src="../websim-stub/websim.js"></script>
<script type="module" src="app.js"></script>
```

Must load before any module scripts that use WebsimSocket or websim APIs.

## OpenAI Integration

### Option 1: config.json (recommended)

Copy `config.example.json` to `config.json` and add your API key:

```json
{
    "openai": {
        "apiKey": "sk-...",
        "chatModel": "gpt-4o-mini",
        "imageModel": "dall-e-3"
    }
}
```

### Option 2: Runtime configuration

```javascript
// Set API key and models (persists to localStorage)
websim.config({
    apiKey: 'sk-...',
    chatModel: 'gpt-4o',
    imageModel: 'dall-e-3'
});

// Check config status
websim.getConfig();
// { openai: { configured: true, chatModel: 'gpt-4o', imageModel: 'dall-e-3' } }

// Clear config (revert to mock responses)
websim.config({ apiKey: null });
```

Config priority: config.json > localStorage > mock responses.
Falls back to mock responses on API errors.

## Globals Provided

### WebsimSocket

```javascript
const room = new WebsimSocket();
const collection = room.collection('tracks');

await collection.create({ name: 'Track 1', data: {} });
await collection.update(id, { name: 'Track 2' });
await collection.delete(id);
await collection.get(id);
await collection.getAll();
await collection.filter(item => item.name === 'Track 1');
collection.subscribe(items => console.log(items));
```

### websim

```javascript
const user = await websim.getCurrentUser();
// { username, id, avatar_url }

const response = await websim.chat.completions.create({
    messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'prompt' }]
});
// { content, role: 'assistant' }

const image = await websim.imageGen({
    prompt: 'description',
    aspect_ratio: '1:1',      // 1:1, 16:9, 9:16, square, landscape, portrait, auto
    size: '1024x1024',        // DALL-E: 1024x1024, 1792x1024, 1024x1792
                              // gpt-image: 1024x1024, 1536x1024, 1024x1536, auto
    model: 'gpt-image-1',     // gpt-image-1, dall-e-3, dall-e-2
    quality: 'high'           // gpt-image: low, medium, high | dall-e-3: standard, hd
});
// { url: 'https://...' } or { url: 'data:image/png;base64,...' }
```

## Storage

Data persists to localStorage:
- `neon_websim_local_data` - Collection records
- `neon_websim_username` - Generated username
- `neon_websim_openai_config` - OpenAI API key and model

## Mock Responses

When OpenAI is not configured, AI chat returns contextual mock responses for:
- Name suggestions
- Commit messages
- Creative prompts
- Pattern generation (JSON)

Image generation uses OpenAI (gpt-image-1, dall-e-3, or dall-e-2) when configured.
- gpt-image-1: Always returns base64 PNG (converted to data URL)
- dall-e-3/dall-e-2: Returns temporary URL (valid 60 min)
- Mock mode: Returns gradient SVG placeholder
